mapper.select:
SELECT OBJECT.SEQ, RESUME.EVS_YEAR, OBJECT.RESUME_SEQ, OBJECT.LOCAL_NAME, OBJECT.POST_GRADE_NAME, OBJECT.MAIN_BUSINESS, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(OBJECT.MAIN_BUSINESS, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) MAIN_BUSINESS_NAME, OBJECT.OBJECT_TYPE, OBJECT.OBJECT_TYPE_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(OBJECT.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPTNAME, TO_CHAR(OBJECT.DATE_STARTED, 'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, OBJECT.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RESUME.EVS_START_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') EVS_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RESUME.EVS_END_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') EVS_END_DATE, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'SEQ') SEQ0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'SEQ') SEQ1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'SEQ') SEQ2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') || '
' || PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT2') AFFIRM_CONTENT0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_CONTENT1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_CONTENT2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_COMMENT') AFFIRM_COMMENT1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_COMMENT') AFFIRM_COMMENT2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_C1_L0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT2') AFFIRM_C2_L0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_C1_L1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT2') AFFIRM_C2_L1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_C1_L2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT2') AFFIRM_C2_L2 FROM EVS_RESUME_INFO RESUME, EVS_OBJECT OBJECT WHERE RESUME.SEQ = OBJECT.RESUME_SEQ AND RESUME.SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND OBJECT.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY OBJECT.PERSON_ID ASC

SELECT SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_CONTENT, ITEM_CONTENT ITEM_CONTENT_TEXT, NVL(ITEM_SCORE, 0) ITEM_SCORE, NVL(EVS_SCORE, 0) EVS_SCORE, NVL(EVS_SCORE1, 0) EVS_SCORE1, NVL(EVS_SCORE2, 0) EVS_SCORE2, NVL(AFFIRM_SCORE, 0) AFFIRM_SCORE, TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY') START_DATE, TO_CHAR(END_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY') END_DATE, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, ACTIVITY FROM EVS_ITEM_SST WHERE EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SEQ)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EVS_ITEM_SST ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_CONTENT, ITEM_SCORE, START_DATE, END_DATE, ACTIVITY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemScore, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
NULL,
1, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update:
UPDATE EVS_ITEM_SST SET ITEM_NAME = #{itemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_CONTENT = #{itemContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_SCORE = #{itemScore, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, START_DATE =
TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
NULL,
END_DATE =
TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
NULL,
UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EVS_ITEM_SST WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
